allow: PowerShell($p = Start-Process "D:\\nishant.bhatt\\DB_Sync\\Base.It\\publish\\Base.It.exe" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { Write-Host "Process running — UI rendered OK \(PID $\($p.Id\)\)"; $p.CloseMainWindow\(\) | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } } else { Write-Host "Process exited with code $\($p.ExitCode\)" })

PowerShell(dotnet build "D:\\nishant.bhatt\\DB_Sync\\Base.It\\Base.It.Core\\Base.It.Core.csproj" -c Debug -v minimal --no-dependencies 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10; dotnet build "D:\\nishant.bhatt\\DB_Sync\\Base.It\\Base.It.App\\Base.It.App.csproj" -c Debug -v minimal 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match 'error|Error CS|AVLN' } | Select-Object -First 20)
